description: Rogue Frontier Patch 3 (12 March 2025) — Destiny Board Reaver line rework, Corrupted/Solo Dungeon chest changes, UI changes, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Axes, Hammers, Holy Staffs, Spears, Swords, War Gloves, Armors, Shoes), Fixes.

sections.heading: Destiny Board Changes
items: The Reaver line bonus has been reworked to prevent unintended interactions with spells and other effects
Bonus defense/damage vs mobs now works as intended for higher-tier enemies
Armor and magic resistance reduction effects are now more effective against higher-tier enemies
sections.searchable_text: Destiny Board Reaver line bonus defense damage mobs higher-tier enemies armor magic resistance reduction

sections.heading: Corrupted and Solo Randomized Dungeon Changes
sections.description: Common Chests now drop Beginner's Tomes of Insight instead of Bags of Silver (which could be empty with the Gold Market Stabilization system). Uncommon, Rare, and Legendary Chests now contain more Bags of Silver.
sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Solo Randomized Dungeon Common Chests Beginner's Tomes Insight Bags Silver Gold Market Stabilization Uncommon Rare Legendary

sections.heading: UI Changes
items: Cast Time and Cooldown Rate modification values now always display a positive value for longer durations and a negative value for reductions; 'Cast Time Reduction' stat renamed to 'Cast Time'
Reduced chat frequency for /HCE, /LFG, /TR, and /REC by increasing message cooldown from 30 seconds to 2 minutes
sections.searchable_text: UI Changes Cast Time Cooldown Rate modification positive negative Cast Time Reduction chat frequency HCE LFG TR REC cooldown 30 seconds 2 minutes

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch are published separately (thread 209402). The following changes were included.
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Dark Sphere Evensong Axes Raging Blades Hammers Giant Steps Forge Hammers Holy Staffs Holy Explosion Great Holy Staff Holy Touch Lifetouch Staff Spears Fling Glaive Swords Heroic Strike War Gloves Fleet Footwork Armors Ambush Assassin Jacket Shoes Giant Guardian Boots Mark of Sacrifice Hellion Shoes Shield Charge Knight Boots Swift Cut Assassin Shoes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Dark Sphere Evensong Damage 100 112

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Raging Blades Removed Targets within 2 meters no damage Damage per tick 26 22

changes.raw_text: Raging Blades: Removed: Targets within 2 meters take no damage. Damage per tick: 26 → 22.
notes: Removed: Targets within 2 meters take no damage

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Giant Steps Forge Hammers Slow 20% 35%

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Holy Explosion Great Holy Staff Resistance increase 0.12 0.16 Holy Touch Lifetouch Staff CC immunity target Range 6m 9m

changes.raw_text: Holy Touch: Added: Target is immune to all crowd-control (unless self-targeting). Range: 6m → 9m.
notes: Added: Target is immune to all crowd-control while channeling (unless self-targeting)

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Fleet Footwork Auto-attack damage buff 150% 125%

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Ambush Assassin Jacket Damage buff per stack 4% 5% Max stacks 10 6 max 40% 30% Stack rate 0.5s 1s

changes.raw_text: Ambush: Damage buff per stack: 4% → 5%; Max buff stacks: 10 → 6 (max damage bonus 40% → 30%); Stack rate: 0.5s → 1s (time to max stacks unchanged).

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Giant Guardian Boots Cooldown 60s 40s Duration 8s 6s Mark of Sacrifice Hellion Shoes Range 12m 15m Shield Charge Knight Boots Cooldown 20s 18s Swift Cut Assassin Shoes Range 11m 15m

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Holy Beam (Holy Staffs) no longer adds a spell effect icon to the target's buff bar
Hamstring (Swords): Fixed issue where the tooltip displayed an incorrect cooldown
Ambush (Assassin Jacket): The damage buff can now be purged and no longer persists if the caster does not deal damage within the first 7 seconds
Fixed issue where icons on the Region Map could duplicate over time
Fixed issue where some tooltips would remain visible and follow the cursor
Fixed issue where Medium Treasure Chests were not visible on the map for players in a neighboring region
Fixed issue where Elite Cursed Harvester did not count towards the Albion Journal mission 'Defeat any Reaper or Harvester'
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Holy Beam spell effect buff bar Hamstring Swords tooltip cooldown Ambush purged 7 seconds Region Map icons duplicate tooltips cursor Medium Treasure Chests neighboring region Elite Cursed Harvester Journal Reaper Harvester graphical animation terrain audio localization
